microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **AI-assisted recovery validation** program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation across engineering and ops teams.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, acting as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, aligning VP- and C-level stakeholders across engineering, security, and compliance orgs.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring end-to-end planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — translating a complex operational challenge into a concrete, high-adoption AI-powered solution.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ structured discovery sessions with Azure service teams — surfacing critical feature gaps and feeding actionable insights back to the development team to guide platform evolution.

Improved **data retrieval and solution quality** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting engineering lookup time by 83% and accelerating time-to-answer for technical teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, co-designing solution roadmaps across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Drove end-to-end solution design to reduce operational toil during region launches — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.

Enabled **executive decision-making** on automation investment by engineering a Power BI dashboard that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, translating raw workflow data into a clear strategic narrative for VP-level stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering teams around a concrete technical execution plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — driving adoption of new workflows across cross-functional engineering teams.

Partnered with IT and Engineering stakeholders to co-design and implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, translating ambiguous deployment requirements into a concrete technical approach that accelerated the software delivery cycle by 25%.

Acted as the integration bridge between Operations and Software teams during a large-scale robotics platform migration, ensuring engineering and business requirements were translated into a **unified technical roadmap** with measurable delivery milestones.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals — implementing a new CRM workflow that improved solution delivery consistency and reduced turnaround time for customer-facing estimates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to better align messaging with target customer needs.

Strengthened leadership pricing strategy by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records — identifying systemic margin leaks and delivering a concrete set of operational recommendations that improved per-job profitability.
